data.title: This European AI Stock May Benefit From Trump's Tariff Threats
data.description: This European AI stock seems well positioned to benefit from Trump's tariff threats. Also, see why DeepSeek Is ‘Good News' for European AI Companies.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Toast Price Expectations Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
Stablecoins Are A Big Deal, But Not Where You'd Expect, Bernstein Says
data.description: Stablecoins are becoming a significant force in financial markets, but their impact is concentrated outside of traditional payments, according to a new report by Bernstein on Wednesday.

data.title: Wrangler & Lee Parent Kontoor Brands Snaps Up Helly Hansen For $900M: Details
data.description: Kontoor Brands plans acquisition of outdoor and workwear brand Helly Hansen for approximately $900 million. The deal is expected to boost Kontoor's revenue and profit, with projections of over $680 million in revenue and $80 million in adjusted EBITDA for 2025.
